explanation: Added extra spaces between arguments and used escaped quotes to test if the Sigma rule can be bypassed by insertion techniques.
Used an alternate name for the net command (net1) and preserved the rest of the command structure to test if the Sigma rule can be bypassed by recoding techniques.
Removed the quotes around the username to test if the Sigma rule can be bypassed by omission techniques.
Reordered the command-line arguments to test if the Sigma rule can be bypassed by reordering techniques.
